svg.title: Codex+ architecture
svg.desc: Codex CLI runs locally under the desktop app. The desktop app connects to the cloud Relay server. Mobile clients connect to the Relay to control desktop Codex sessions.

text.font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, sans-serif
Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, sans-serif

svg.text: Codex stays on the workstation. Desktop owns execution. Mobile controls sessions through Relay.

text.font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, sans-serif
Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, sans-serif

svg.text: Flow: mobile sends commands through Relay. Desktop executes them against local Codex and publishes snapshots or events back through Relay.
